name: BT Catalog
changelog: EG-PRO color swatches now show a real color: their 34 named colors are mapped to hex values so the chips fill in (re-run EG-PRO import/refresh to apply). Catalog lists now sort by product-type popularity too — t-shirts first, then polos/tanks/fleece/bottoms, with jackets and masks/accessories last — so browsing a brand leads with shirts.
